app.title: Geospatial Studio
app.subtitle: Amap / Baidu / OSM · Geocoding + Polygon / POI Query · GeoJSON / KML / CSV Export

settings.title: API Settings
settings.osmWarning: Nominatim rate limit: 1 req/sec. For large batches, use Amap or Baidu instead.
settings.osmFree: OpenStreetMap requires no API Key — completely free and open.
settings.gaodeKeyPlaceholder: Enter Amap Web Service API Key...
settings.gaodeKeyHint: Create a 'Web Service' type Key at Amap Open Platform
settings.baiduKeyHint: Create a Browser/JS type AK at Baidu Map Open Platform
settings.regionFilterHintOsm: Results will be constrained to this region
settings.regionFilterHintOther: Forces search within the region — prevents cross-province mismatches

input.fileDrag: Click or drag to upload CSV / Excel file

convert.areaMode: Area Query Mode (use the query button above)

toast.screenshotHint: Switch to a standard map tile layer and try again
toast.areaNoResultHint: No OSM polygon data found for '{{keyword}}'

history.title: History
history.description: Last 20 conversion sessions, persisted across page refreshes.

candidate.title: Select Best Match — {{address}}
candidate.description: Found {{count}} candidates. Please choose the most accurate one:

areaQuery.title: Spatial Data Query
areaQuery.modeSemanticHint: Search by place name / POI / administrative district
areaQuery.modeRectangleHint: Draw a rectangle on the map to extract polygons within
areaQuery.modePolygonHint: Draw an arbitrary polygon on the map to extract polygons within
areaQuery.keywordPlaceholder: e.g. Zhongshan Park Jinan, Chaoyang District
areaQuery.drawRectHint: Click two diagonal corners on the map to create a rectangle
areaQuery.drawPolyHint: Click on the map to draw a polygon (double-click to finish)
areaQuery.osmDatasetHint: Area extraction is powered by OpenStreetMap. No API keys required.
areaQuery.interactionHint: Draw a polygon on the map to extract all area features within the boundary.
areaQuery.polygonDisabled: Polygon extraction is only available on OpenStreetMap
